one_line_thesis: Post-Versigent spin, Aptiv is a global auto-tech compounder (Intelligent Systems + Engineered Components) trading at ~8.6% pro forma owner-cash yield with ~19% synthesis IRR; hold pending pro forma confirmation.

deep_dive.executive_summary:
Aptiv is a post-spin automotive technology supplier focused on Intelligent Systems (ADAS, compute, Wind River software) and Engineered Components (high-performance interconnects). FY2025 pre-spin revenue was $20.4 billion; segment adjusted operating income was $2.46 billion; operating cash flow $2.19 billion; GAAP net income to Aptiv $165 million after Wind River impairment. Q1 2026 revenue was $5.09 billion, up about five percent year over year; net income $191 million.

At $59.86 per share on pro forma post-Versigent owner cash of $5.15 per share, we expect about 18.88% per year over seve...

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: High-return compounder
applicability_tests: Owner earnings can be separated from stock compensation, working capital, and maintenance capital.
Incremental returns on retained capital are observable and durable.
The competitive advantage explains pricing, retention, share, or cost outcomes.
Terminal value is supported by a reinvestment runway rather than an unexplained multiple.
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation_decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

timeline.label: Net income moved -90.8% versus the prior period (1,787.0 to 165.0).
Completed tax-free spin of Electrical Distribution Systems as Versigent (VGNT); remaining Aptiv focuses on Intelligent Systems and Engineered Components
FY2025 $648M goodwill impairment on Wind River reporting unit; GAAP net income to Aptiv fell to $165M while operating cash flow remained $2.2B
Announced plan to separate Electrical Distribution Systems; realigned reportable segments to AS&UX, Engineered Components Group, and EDS
Equity offering via 424B5 prospectus supplements; balance-sheet flexibility ahead of separation planning
Acquired Wind River Systems for edge software and OTA capabilities across automotive and adjacent markets
June 2020 equity offering during COVID auto shutdown; strengthened liquidity for cyclical trough
Created Motional autonomous driving joint venture with Hyundai; Aptiv retained equity method stake
Spun off Powertrain Systems as Delphi Technologies (later BorgWarner); Aptiv retained electrification/architecture focus
Renamed from Delphi Automotive to Aptiv PLC; repositioned as advanced vehicle technology supplier
Emergence from Chapter 11 as Delphi Automotive; leaner cost structure and global footprint reset

industry.structure: Automotive technology supply is an oligopoly of scaled tier-one suppliers (Bosch, Continental, Aptiv, Lear, Yazaki) competing for platform awards with multi-year programs; switching costs are high once designed in.
industry.share_shift: Aptiv outgrew global production modestly in FY2025 (+3% volume vs +4% industry per 10-K MD&A) but faces share pressure in commoditized wiring while gaining in ADAS compute and connection systems.
industry.trend: Electrification and software-defined vehicles increase content per car; OEM price-downs and China localization remain headwinds; post-spin Aptiv is more software- and interconnect-weighted versus legacy wiring-heavy mix.
